image:image.image:title: NEXUS Dashboard — Personal Productivity System
image:image.image:caption: NEXUS clipboard sync feature and dashboard view — self-hosted cross-device app

image:image.image:title: NEXUS Media Vault — Secure Storage
image:image.image:caption: Encrypted media vault UI: private photos and file storage on user Supabase bucket

image:image.image:title: NEXUS Clipboard Panel
image:image.image:caption: Cross-device clipboard sync panel — quick copy and paste across devices

image:image.image:title: NEXUS AI Assistant — Query & Summaries
image:image.image:caption: AI assistant conversation and summary interface integrated with your personal data

image:image.image:title: NEXUS Focus Tracker
image:image.image:caption: Focus session controls and analytics for Pomodoro sessions and habit tracking

image:image.image:title: NEXUS Personal Knowledge Base
image:image.image:caption: Searchable notes and personal KB UI for storing research and references

image:image.image:title: NEXUS Settings & Sync Console
image:image.image:caption: Settings, account & Supabase sync console for the self-hosted NEXUS instance
